normalization.notes: Store Thai text in NFC and preserve visible vowel signs, tone marks, and original combining-mark order for audit. Use decomposition only in analysis tooling.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: consonant bases, vowel signs by position, tone marks, final consonant roles, leading-H clusters, silent carriers, and common syllable frames
segmentation.notes: This backfill mirrors the existing runtime lesson order in src/lib/data/thai.ts. Thai has no whitespace word boundaries, so v1 uses authored word and syllable segmentation until a reviewed tokenizer pipeline is approved.

sources.notes: Existing Glyphin Thai runtime lessons. Treat as the source of truth for this backfill packet.
Durable Thai sequencing rationale for frequency first consonants, vowel placement, tones as sight words, and environmental-print validation.
